title: 404 Error with Anthropic Node Requests
symptom: Requests to Claude models using the Anthropic node return a 404 error. The error message is vague, providing no further debugging information.
root_cause: The 404 error occurs due to incorrect URL formatting, often caused by an extra trailing slash in the endpoint. This can happen if the URL is not properly constructed or if there are changes in the API that are not reflected in the n8n configuration.
fix_steps: Check the URL endpoint used in the Anthropic node settings
Remove any trailing slashes or duplicate slashes
Retry the request to the Claude models
agent_instruction: Ensure the URL endpoint for the Anthropic node does not have trailing slashes and test the connection.
